# Exodia Labs

> Next-Gen Cybersecurity Lab applying cutting-edge AI technologies to malware detection and autonomous threat intelligence.

## Projects

- Exodus: An open-source agentic framework designed to orchestrate autonomous swarms for security operations.
- Code Reaper: High-performance static analysis worker utilizing sandboxing for secure, isolated code execution.
- VirusTotal Integration: Powering crowdsourced threat intelligence through our browser extension.
